daily_summary.headline: SpaceX Starlink Launches and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Starlink Group 10-38 Launch
top_events.description: Launch of Falcon 9 carrying Starlink satellites from Cape Canaveral.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 geomagnetic storm expected, possible aurora visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check skies if at high latitude

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 CAS500-2 & Others Launch
top_events.description: Launch of Falcon 9 carrying multiple satellites including CAS500-2 from Vandenberg.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
